description_long: This is a medium-sized, vintage-style storage chest with a curved, domed lid and a weathered blue painted finish. The box features black metal hardware, including a central latch on the front and visible hinges on the back, as well as decorative rivets along the lid's edge. The surface shows signs of wear and distress, giving it a rustic, well-used appearance. The chest is constructed primarily from wood, with metal reinforcements and fasteners for durability. There are no visible handles or labeling areas, and the design is simple yet functional. Its robust build and secure closure make it suitable for storing various items in urban environments such as garages, workshops, or storage rooms.
description: A weathered blue wooden storage chest with a domed lid, black metal hardware, and a rustic, vintage appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the domed lid, central black latch, and decorative rivets along the lid's edge.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved profile of the lid and the absence of handles or additional features.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the two black metal hinges and the continuation of the rivet detailing.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the curved lid and plain side panel.
